schema.description: Request to tween an entity's rotation

target.description: Target rotation as a quaternion [x, y, z, w]

durationMs.description: Duration of the tween animation in milliseconds (must be greater than 0)

easing.description: Easing function for the animation. Defaults to linear.
easing.title: TweenEasing

wait.description: Whether to wait for the animation to complete before returning. Defaults to false.

schema.title: TweenRotationRequest
